reviews.name: sarah foster
reviews.text:
Lovely authentic hotel. Modern bathroom large room on top floor with its own gorgeous balcony.stunnibg views
Friendly owners
Simple fresh breakfast
Great bar onsite

reviews.name: Pavlo Nikitin
reviews.text: Очень уютное место
reviews.textTranslated: A very cozy place

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Heiko Lorenz
reviews.text: Oktober 2025: Toll gelegene, privat geführte Unterkunft mit landestypischen, ausreichendem Frühstück. Die Unterkunft ist modern und sauber, die Herbergseltern freundlich und zuvorkommend. Man kann direkt vor der Tür parken. Von der Unterkunft aus kann man schön die Burg erkunden und findet genügend Restaurants fußläufig. In die Stadt führt eine abschüssige glattgelaufene Pflasterstraße, den Rückweg sollte man bequem mit dem Taxi absolvieren.
reviews.textTranslated: October 2025: A beautifully located, privately run accommodation with a hearty, local breakfast. The accommodation is modern and clean, and the hosts are friendly and accommodating. Parking is available right outside. From the accommodation, you can easily explore the castle and find plenty of restaurants within walking distance. A sloping, smooth cobblestone road leads into town; the return journey is best made by taxi.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value

reviews.name: Ronen Faradian
reviews.text: מקום מעולה, יפה, אותנטי. החדרים יפים, המיקום הוא בתוך המתחם של הטירה.חניה בצמוד.
reviews.textTranslated: Excellent place, beautiful, authentic. The rooms are beautiful, the location is within the castle complex. Parking nearby.

reviews.name: Ofer Ben Shalom
reviews.text:
Incredible guesthouse.
Located in the walls of the Berat castle, watching an amazing view of the valley & city bellow.

The hosts are incredible, always helping with anything we have needed.

Rooms are simple yet provided exactly what we needed. There are many restaurants nearby, and adjacent parking.

Greatly recommended.

reviews.name: Uli Steingruber
reviews.text:
Schönstes Guesthouse während unserer Albanientour.
Aldi, der Besitzer ist sehr nett und hilft bei allen Fragen.
Dachzimmer ausgesprochen schön mit guter Aussicht.
reviews.textTranslated:
The most beautiful guesthouse during our Albania tour.
Aldi, the owner, is very nice and helps with any questions.
The attic room is extremely nice with a great view.

reviews.name: segev eshel
reviews.text:
We had the best time!
The host was super nice and kind!
The rooms were great, and it have the most beautiful view from the castle to Berat.

similarHotelsNearby.name: Villa EnSalv Berat- Apartment- Room- PentHouse

reviews.name: muhammed yeşilkaya
reviews.text: The view is very good and the atmosphere of rooms are very otantic. It make me feel like a movie of 1970's. And also kind a dream horror movie. I loved that place.

reviews.name: Samrudhi Tidke
reviews.text: Highly recommend for anyone visiting berat, very helpful host. Near to the city centre and berat castle, only walking distance. Very clean property and beautiful view.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Romantic, Great value

reviews.name: 757tykaw
reviews.text: The house was super cozy with an amazing view. The owner of the house was very helpful by informing us in advance that google with not direct us correctly so they gave additional information to find the place. They also recommended some restaurants in the area which were really good. The staff was very nice and helpful overall I would definitely recommend staying here. The only thing is you need to be good driver (this applies to Albania in general) as the parking area is really tight especially if their are more cars and the entrance is on a bumpy road.

reviews.name: Czárán Tamás
reviews.text: Villa Rosa is an excelllent place to stay in Berat, well equipped, and with a wonderful view. Approaching it by car is a bit of a hassle, but the instructions given by the host are really helpful. Parking the car below the house, close to the center is a good alternative option. We loved to stay here, thank you, File!

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Szymon Ruchała
reviews.text: Kozacko ale hardcore wjazd i parking
reviews.textTranslated: Awesome but hardcore entry and parking

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value

reviewContext.Noteworthy details: Nebojte se příjezdu Peugeot 301 to v pohodě zvládnul.

reviews.name: Lucas Van Wijmeersch
reviews.text:
Magnifique terrasse avec une vue imprenable — idéale pour une soirée entre amis inoubliable !
La chambre est confortable et bien équipée, avec tout le nécessaire pour un séjour agréable.
L’accès peut s’avérer un peu compliqué avec une voiture basse, mais un parking sécurisé est disponible.
Accueil chaleureux et sympathique, ce qui ajoute à la qualité de l’expérience.
reviews.textTranslated:
Magnificent terrace with breathtaking views—ideal for an unforgettable evening with friends!
The room is comfortable and well-equipped, with everything you need for a pleasant stay.
Access can be a little tricky with a low-rise car, but secure parking is available.
The warm and friendly welcome adds to the quality of the experience.

reviews.name: Julie
reviews.text: Een gemengd gevoel. Het verblijf was moeilijk te vinden. Wel een hele mooie omgeving! De kamer was eerder primitief. Als je wou douchen moest je de douchekop zelf vasthouden want er hing een boiler in de weg waardoor heel de badkamer onder water zat inclusief het toilet. Dunne lakens waardoor we het ‘s nachts koud hadden. Wel door eigenaar naar een heel leuk restaurantje met een uitzicht op de stad gebracht, waar er een heerlijk ontbijt op ons stond te wachten. Helaas waren hier wel heel veel wespen aanwezig maar geen wespenvallen aanwezig. Het was een oké tussenstop maar we denken niet dat we dit terug zouden boeken…
reviews.textTranslated: A mixed feeling. The accommodation was hard to find. The surroundings were very beautiful, though! The room was rather primitive. If you wanted to shower, you had to hold the showerhead yourself because a boiler was in the way, causing the entire bathroom to flood, including the toilet. Thin sheets meant we were cold at night. However, the owner took us to a very nice little restaurant with a view of the city, where a delicious breakfast was waiting for us. Unfortunately, there were a lot of wasps there, but no wasp traps. It was an okay stopover, but we don't think we would book this again...

reviews.name: 660giuseppinar
reviews.text: Una camera accogliente, piacevole e pulita, con splendida vista sul monte Taborr, dotata di terrazza dove si sta volentieri a godersi il paesaggio. |Abbiamo apprezzato la possibilità di lavare e stendere avendo a disposizione lo stendibiancheria.|Colazione presso il ristorante a pochi metri.
reviews.textTranslated: A cozy, pleasant, and clean room with a splendid view of Mount Taborr, complete with a terrace where you can enjoy the scenery. We appreciated the laundry facilities and the clothesline. Breakfast was served at the restaurant a few meters away.

reviews.name: Victor Javier
reviews.text:
La relación calidad-precio-ubicación. En plena cima de la fortaleza de Berat, con parking, para poder visitar la ciudadela nada más salir del alojamiento. Habitación cómoda, limpia, con aire acondicionado y calefacción.

Lo único que mejoraría sería poner algún tipo de mampara en la ducha para no mojar todo el suelo al ducharse. El desayuno está rico (no súper abundante pero rico), aunque podrían ofrecer zumo además de té.

En cualquier caso, son cosas minoritarias, por el precio y la.ubicación, el sitio está espectacular.
reviews.textTranslated:
The value for money and location are excellent. Right at the top of Berat Fortress, with parking, so you can visit the citadel right from your accommodation. The room was comfortable, clean, and had air conditioning and heating.

The only thing I would improve is adding some kind of shower screen to avoid getting the floor wet. The breakfast is good (not huge, but tasty), although they could offer juice in addition to tea.

In any case, these are minor issues; for the price and location, the place is spectacular.

reviews.name: D9140VHmarks
reviews.text: Lovely room within the castle walls. Room|was clean and today, with a nice courtyard and balcony out the front. Great fresh cooked breakfast at the restaurant opposite.  Easy to book and great communication, could easily check into our room when we wanted to. Would recommend. Also the castle location is excellent, lovely views and great places to eat and drink within the walls

reviews.name: Bene Piccoli
reviews.text: Camera spaziosa e pulita con tutto l’occorrente! Il proprietario ə molto gentile e disponibile a qualsiasi evenienza! Consiglio assolutamente anche perché sta proprio all’in ternò delle mura e la sera è molto bello passeggiare con nessuno intorno.
reviews.textTranslated: Spacious and clean room with everything you need! The owner is very kind and available for any eventuality! I absolutely recommend it, especially because it's right inside the walls and in the evening it's very nice to walk around with no one around.

reviews.name: Ondare Lagunak
reviews.text: Habitación muy espaciosa en una casa tradicional. La atención del personal fue muy buena. La casa se ubica dentro del casco antiguo por lo que hay que aparcar a la entrada del pueblo.
reviews.textTranslated: Very spacious room in a traditional house. The staff was very attentive. The house is located in the old town, so you have to park at the entrance to the village.

reviews.name: Alberto rossi espagnet
reviews.text: Super nice place to sleep inside the old citadel of Berat. Nice rooms, very clean and traditional, with wooden ceiling and pavement. Very quiet, they brought us a welcoming with fresh figs and rakia. Very good breakfast included in the price at a nearby restaurant

reviews.name: Chris
reviews.text:
Lovely place to stay within the castle.
The room was perfectly clean and decorated with the traditional style.
Confortable bed, towels, fridge, even hair dryer...
Extremely quite. Lovely to wake up and walk around without any tourists around.
Great welcome with a raki and fruits. Owners are very helpful and friendly.
You can drive up to the parking inside the castle.
Nice breakfast with fruits, cheese, omelet and tea.
Great value for money. Shame we stayed only one night

reviews.name: Susie Manshande
reviews.text: Great communication, thank you!

reviews.name: Brisilda Mana
reviews.text: very good conditions. I was satisfied. I will come back to visit again.

reviews.name: edwin de rooden
reviews.text: Super en mooi appartement, perfecte bedden en goede kussens, rustig gelegen in een traditionele woonwijk
reviews.textTranslated: Super and beautiful apartment, perfect beds and good pillows, quietly located in a traditional residential area.

reviews.name: Zwiqqle
reviews.text: Sehr schöne Unterkunft! Der Gastgeber war ebenfalls sehr nett & half uns bei der Kommunikation mit dem Vermieter unseres Mietwagens! Wir kommen sehr gerne wieder
reviews.textTranslated: A very nice place to stay! The host was also very friendly and helped us communicate with the rental company! We would love to come back again.

reviews.name: Iratxe Martin
reviews.text: El durño majisimo , te ayuda en todo , lugar agradable
reviews.textTranslated: The owner is very friendly, he helps you with everything, pleasant place

reviews.name: Marine “MarinshR”
reviews.text: 2nd time at Tomor’s house. Always a pleasure !! The best breakfast we had. The best host. A kind and lovable soul. We consider him as a friend now! His wife cooks amazingly. Recommend 100%

reviews.name: Peter Oppeker
reviews.text: Wir waren im Sommer bei Tomor zu Gast. Er hat sich rührend um uns gekümmert und uns viele Informationen gegeben. Das Zimmer war sehr gut, das Frühstück hervorragend, ein empfehlenswerter Gastgeber!
reviews.textTranslated: We stayed with Tomor this summer. He took wonderful care of us and gave us lots of information. The room was very good, the breakfast excellent – ​​a highly recommended host!

reviews.name: Μανθος Λαμπρακης
reviews.text:
Απο την ομορφη Κρητη... στο πολυ ομορφο Μπερατι... Ενα απιστευτο ταξειδι με παραμονη προτοχρονιας στον ξενωνα Guest  house. Ο οικοδεσποτης Tomor Shehu ηταν παρα πολυ φιλικος και χαμογελαστος με τα δωματια του να ειναι κεντρικα εχοντας ολα τα καφε και φαγαδικα στα ποδια σου.
Το δωματιο ηταν αρκετα καλο για αυτο που ψαχναμε.
Συγουρα την επομενη φορα που θα παμε θα ειναι σε εσενα αγαπητε Tomor!!!
Σε ευχατιστουμε για ολλα.
reviews.textTranslated:
From beautiful Crete... to the very beautiful Berati... An incredible trip with a New Year's Eve stay at the Guest house. The host Tomor Shehu was very friendly and smiling with his rooms being centrally located with all the coffee and food at your feet.
The room was quite good for what we were looking for.
Surely the next time we go it will be with you dear Tomor!!!
We congratulate you for everything.

reviews.name: Daniel Ninio
reviews.text:
Tomor and his wife were the best hosts I’ve ever had in any guesthouse I’ve ever been to.  Period. We’ve experienced great hospitality and great breakfast. He welcomed us with a great smile and lots of love, helped us every day to get a close parking spot, literally standing in an empty spots nearby!

There’s a mosque really close, but we heard it only once a day on the afternoon, and it didn’t make any sound in the morning. Don’t worry about it!

Moreover, Tomor sent us a lot of explanations about the city’s history and leisure activities. Highly recommended!! Thank you Tomor! ❤️

reviews.name: Maria Elisa Zafra Griñán
reviews.text: Un alojamiento excelente! La ubicación inmejorable, en una calle tranquila, a 1' del paseo, especial para dar una vuelta de noche. Tomor, el dueño fue muy amable, nos explicó un poquito la historia de la ciudad y hasta nos enseñó fotos de la crecida del río. Si vuelvo repetiré.
reviews.textTranslated: Excellent accommodation! The location is unbeatable, on a quiet street, just a minute from the promenade, perfect for an evening stroll. Tomor, the owner, was very friendly; he explained a bit about the city's history and even showed us photos of the river flooding. If I return, I'll definitely stay here again.

reviews.name: Wolfgang Frieß
reviews.text: Tomor ist ein exzellenter Gastgeber. Wir wurden mit Trauben und einer Tasse Mocca und vielen guten Ratschlägen für den Aufenthalt in Berat empfangen. Die Lage in der Altstadt ist bestens, das Zimmer sauber und wohnlich. Eine uneingeschränkte Empfehlung ist auch das Frühstück, unbedingt buchen! Für das Abendessen bietet sich das kleine aber sehr gute Restaurant Mali in der Nähe an.
reviews.textTranslated: Tomor is an excellent host. We were welcomed with grapes, a cup of mocha, and lots of great advice for our stay in Berat. The location in the old town is superb, and the room was clean and comfortable. Breakfast is also highly recommended – definitely book it! For dinner, the small but excellent Restaurant Mali nearby is a great option.

reviews.name: Roberto Colombo
reviews.text:
Il posto è in centro all'inizio del quartiere storico Mangalem e a due passi dalla zona pedonale quindi in ottima posizione per visitare la città e scaricare i bagagli.
Tomor (il proprietario) è un esempio di gentilezza e accoglienza albanese sempre disponibile per consigli sulle città. la camera è semplice ma tipica di un'abitazione tipica ottomana con patio esterno per la colazione che consigliamo.
reviews.textTranslated:
The place is centrally located at the entrance to the historic Mangalem neighborhood and just steps from the pedestrian area, making it an excellent base for exploring the city and dropping off luggage.
Tomor (the owner) is a paragon of Albanian kindness and hospitality, always available for city recommendations. The room is simple but typical of a traditional Ottoman home, with an outdoor patio for breakfast, which we highly recommend.

reviews.name: nonange
reviews.text: Ottima sistemazione a Barat! La casa é comoda, facile da raggiungere, il signor Tomor, gentilissimo parla italiano e inglese. L'ospitalità é offerta  in stanze con entrate autonome. La super colazione preparata dalla moglie, viene servita sotto un pergolato!
reviews.textTranslated: Excellent accommodation in Barat! The house is comfortable, easy to get to, and Mr. Tomor is extremely kind and speaks both Italian and English. Accommodation is provided in rooms with private entrances. The delicious breakfast, prepared by his wife, is served under a pergola!

title: Guest House Lion
address: PW4X+8XV, Rruga Kol Myzeqari, Berat 5001, Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: This is the view from the terrace. You deserve a beer when you get here!

reviews.name: vanessa gautheron
reviews.text: Vue magnifique et lieu paisible. Très agréable pour une petite pause. Très bon service et nourriture très bien aussi.
reviews.textTranslated: Beautiful view and peaceful location. Very pleasant for a short break. Excellent service and very good food too.

reviews.name: Celina
reviews.text: Der Weg zum Hotel ist etwas steil aber mit gesunden Füßen leicht machbar und auch nicht allzu lang. Empfangen wird man von einer süßen Katze und einem total netten und freundlichen Inhaber. Das Zimmer ist sauber (mit Klimaanlage) und hat wunderschöne Aussicht. Zusätzlich wird man gefragt wann man morgens frühstücken möchten. Das Frühstück, welches im Preis von ca. 30€  inbegriffen ist, beinhaltet: Ei, Tomate, Gurke, Traube, Banane, Brot und eiskalten Orangen Saft. Man befindet sich sehr zentral in der Stadt. Ein Ausflug zur Burg ist vom Hotel aus Optimal und nicht allzu weit. Bezahlen kann man am nächsten morgen in Euro oder Lek.
reviews.textTranslated: The path to the hotel is a bit steep, but easy to manage with strong feet, and not too long. You'll be greeted by a sweet cat and a really nice and friendly owner. The room is clean (air-conditioned) and has a beautiful view. You'll also be asked what time you'd like breakfast. Breakfast, which is included in the price of approximately €30, includes: egg, tomato, cucumber, grapes, banana, bread, and ice-cold orange juice. The hotel is very centrally located in the city. A trip to the castle is ideal from the hotel and not too far away. You can pay the next morning in euros or lek.

reviews.name: M L
reviews.text:
Situé en haut de la vielle ville de Berat, la guesthouse peut être difficile d’accès pour certaines personnes. Mais une fois là haut, la vue sur la ville est belle. Notre chambre était spacieuse, et donnait justement sur ce panorama urbain. L’hôtel aurait donc tout pour plaire si la chambre était un peu mieux dépoussiérée, au niveau du lit et des fenêtres notamment. Il manque une ampoule dans le lustre. Mais ceci n'est rien. Le gros problème est l’indifférence totale des gérants pour leurs clients. Arrivé à l’hôtel, notre chambre n’était pas prête. Pas de soucis ça arrive. On nous a indiqué la terrasse du bar pour patienter mais personne ne nous a proposé une boisson alors qu'il faisait très chaud dehors.
Coté petit dej, il faut indiquer la veille l’heure que l’on souhaite prendre le petit déjeuner du lendemain. (Entre 8h et 9h30) Le petit-déjeuner (compris dans le tarif) se résume pour 2 personnes à:
-1 banane
-2 assiettes de tomates et concombres -3 tranches de pain plus ou moins sec
-pichet de jus d’orange industriel.
Pas de café ( c’est en supplément) de beurre ,confiture ou quelque chose à mettre sur le pain.
Mais c’est surtout leur attitude qui nous a dérangée. On avait l’impression le matin de les réveiller pour qu'ils nous servent le petit déj (encore en pyjama?) Pas un bonjour, pas un mot... et ils repartent (se coucher?) à peine les plats servis.
Nous n’avons vu personne pour le check out, heureusement nous avons eu la présence d’esprit de payer avant!

Évidement ce commentaire contraste avec les précédents mais c’est ce que nous avons vécu entre le 13 et le 15 septembre 2025. Je ne peux que recommander de trouver mieux à proximité.
reviews.textTranslated:
Located at the top of Berat's old town, the guesthouse can be difficult to access for some. But once you're up there, the view of the city is beautiful. Our room was spacious and offered a stunning panoramic view. The hotel would have everything going for it if the room were a little cleaner, especially the bed and windows. There was even a lightbulb missing in the chandelier. But that's a minor detail. The main problem is the managers' complete indifference to their guests. When we arrived at the hotel, our room wasn't ready. No worries, these things happen. We were directed to the bar's terrace to wait, but no one offered us a drink, even though it was very hot outside. As for breakfast, you have to specify the time you want to have breakfast the next day the day before. (Between 8:00 and 9:30 AM) Breakfast (included in the price) for two people consisted of:
- 1 banana
- 2 plates of tomatoes and cucumbers - 3 slices of bread, more or less dry
- a pitcher of commercial orange juice.

No coffee (it was extra), no butter, jam, or anything to put on the bread.

But it was their attitude that bothered us most. We felt like we were waking them up in the morning just to get breakfast (still in their pajamas?). Not a hello, not a word... and they left (to go to bed?) as soon as the food was served.

We didn't see anyone for check-out; luckily, we had the presence of mind to pay beforehand!

Obviously, this review contrasts with the previous ones, but this is what we experienced between September 13th and 15th, 2025. I can only recommend finding something better nearby.

reviews.name: Ivana a
reviews.text: Sehr hübsch, wunderbare Aussicht. Man kriegt etwas gratis Frühstück: Tomaten, Gurke, Spiegelei, Banane und Baklava. Man kann auch abends vegan essen, und zwar die gefüllte Paprika und Aubergine. Das Zimmer und das Personal sind nett.
reviews.textTranslated: Very pretty, wonderful view. You get a complimentary breakfast: tomatoes, cucumber, fried egg, banana, and baklava. Vegan options are also available in the evening, namely stuffed peppers and eggplant. The room and staff are friendly.

reviews.name: Adventure girly
reviews.text: We had went for some drinks but were never attended or even greeted. Amazing view but terrible service. We left to the place next door and received immediate service.

reviews.name: Anxhelo Cela
reviews.text: Best service in town

updatesFromCustomers.text: Las vista desde el sitio de desayuno

reviews.name: Nis
reviews.text:
Supertolle Unterkunft für einen Besuch in Berat.
Großer Parkplatz vor dem Haus [selten in Berat].
Achtung: Google Maps leitet euch einen völligen Mist zusammen. Wir haben es nur hoch geschafft weil Allrad, welches wir zuschalten mussten. Fahrt unbedingt die Straße am Restaurant RUS!!! vorbei dann müsst ihr nicht 1000 Tode sterben.
Es führen um die 180 Treppenstufen hinunter in die Stadt, der Weg ist größtenteils Unbeleuchtet.
Die Duschen sind für albanische Verhältnisse ganz normal im Bad so integriert dass man weder Duschwanne noch Vorhang etc hat, schön wäre jedoch einen Abzueher zu haben, sodass man ein wenig trocken machen kann.
Das Frühstück ist okay, nichts besonderes. Kaffee ist Mangelware haben unsere Espressokocher dabei gehabt, Lucky us.
Der Besitzer macht jedoch Espresso, auf Wunsch auch Americano.
Alles in allem war es fantastisch hier zu sein, die Gastgeber, Vater und Sohn sind super nett, Sprachen englisch und Italienisch.
reviews.textTranslated:
Fantastic accommodation for a visit to Berat.

Large parking lot in front of the house [rare in Berat].

Warning: Google Maps gives you completely wrong directions. We only made it up because we had to use four-wheel drive. Make sure to drive past the RUS restaurant!!! to avoid a million deaths.

There are about 180 steps down into town, and the path is mostly unlit.

The showers are typical for Albanian standards, integrated into the bathroom without a shower tray or curtain, etc. It would be nice to have an extractor fan so you could dry off a bit.

Breakfast is okay, nothing special. Coffee is scarce; we had our espresso maker with us, lucky us.

The owner does make espresso, though, and Americano upon request.

All in all, it was fantastic to be here. The hosts, father and son, are super nice and speak English and Italian.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Katarzyna Roszak
reviews.text: Un séjour absolument parfait, avec une vue époustouflante et le petit déjeuner délicieux !!!
reviews.textTranslated: An absolutely perfect stay, with a breathtaking view and a delicious breakfast!!!

reviews.name: Eugen Arndt
reviews.text: Sehr freundlicher Besitzer. Schlichte, aber saubere Zimmer. Jedoch fehlt der Duschvorhang und dadurch wird das ganze Badezimmer nass. Das Haus zu finden ist gar nicht so einfach. Aber die Aussicht ist exzellent. Über einen schmalen Pfad gelangt man runter ins Stadtzentrum. Man sollte aber gut zu Fuß sein 😉
reviews.textTranslated: Very friendly owner. Simple but clean rooms. However, the shower curtain is missing, which means the entire bathroom gets wet. Finding the house isn't that easy. But the view is excellent. A narrow path leads down to the town center. You should be a good walker, though 😉

reviews.name: Susanne
reviews.text: Wundervoller Ausblick auf Berat und die Olivenhaine! Die Gastgeber sind wahnsinnig herzlich und total bemüht! Große Empfehlung :)
reviews.textTranslated: Wonderful view of Berat and the olive groves! The hosts are incredibly welcoming and attentive! Highly recommended :)

reviewContext.Walkability: In 10 Minuten fußläufig in der Stadt
reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Estelle LEROY
reviews.text:
Nous avons séjourné 2 nuits.
La vue est magnifique et la terrasse agréable.
Les hôtes sont très gentils.
Accès en centre ville à pied en moins de dix minutes.
Accès en voiture possible
reviews.textTranslated:
We stayed for two nights.

The view is magnificent and the terrace is lovely.

The hosts are very kind.

The city center is less than a ten-minute walk away.

Accessible by car.

reviews.name: Milena P
reviews.text: Hotel na żywo wygląda o wiele lepiej niż na zdjęciach. Pokoje są skromne ale czyste, jest wszystko czego potrzeba. Piękny widok na panoramę miasta. Do centrum można zejść schodami od ogrodu właściciela,zajmuje to 5 min- nic strasznego :)  dojazd trochę trudny ale Gospodarz wysłał mapę i daliśmy radę nawet starym fordem fiesta. Bardzo podobał mi się ogród- tak sielsko, wiejsko - są drzewa z oliwkami, winogron, granaty czy figi, które można jeść prosto z drzewka :) niska cena, a jest fajnie ! Warto odwiedzić nawet dla samego widoku. Dziękuję ☺️
reviews.textTranslated: The hotel looks much better in person than in the photos. The rooms are modest but clean, and have everything you need. The view of the city skyline is beautiful. You can walk down a flight of stairs from the owner's garden to the city center; it takes 5 minutes—no problem. Getting there is a bit tricky, but the host sent a map, and we managed, even in an old Ford Fiesta. I really enjoyed the garden—it's so idyllic, rustic—there are olive trees, grapes, pomegranates, and figs you can eat straight from the tree. The price is low, but it's lovely! It's worth a visit, even just for the view. Thank you ☺️

reviews.name: A Rsl
reviews.text: The guest house was very cozy and beautiful, very much a "summer in italy" vibe, with grapevines and a lovely view. There was also a cute cat who came to say hi. The complimentary breakfast was tasty and the rooms were clean. The wifi was a bit weak in our room but it was fine.

reviews.name: Antonia Reid
reviews.text: The owner was incredibly kind and welcoming, and he’ll make sure you have the right directions to reach the hotel by car. Breakfast was absolutely delicious and served in his beautiful garden. The walk to and from town is quite steep, but it’s a lovely stroll.

title: Guest House Cela City Centre, Berat

reviews.name: Gemma Moore
reviews.text: Very clean and very quiet air corn unit.. has double glazing and shutters.. was great to get cool and relax after a long day in the sun..

reviews.name: Mateus Mile
reviews.text: Just perfect ❤️

reviews.name: Fatma Kajo
reviews.text: Very helpfull and kind staff. Good service. Nice and clean accomodations. Highly recommendable.

reviews.name: Ismail
reviews.text:
Logement tout neuf, très propre et en plein centre ville.
Malgré la proximité la rue aucun bruit.
Le gérant est hyper sympa et disponible par whatsupp
Je recommande vivement.
reviews.textTranslated:
Brand new, very clean apartment right in the city center.

Despite being close to the street, it was completely silent.

The manager is extremely friendly and available via WhatsApp.
I highly recommend it.

reviews.name: Aurelien Van Der Meerschen
reviews.text: Très propre, neuf et le gérant est très gentil et joignable !
reviews.textTranslated: Very clean, new and the manager is very kind and approachable!

reviews.name: Soledad Garff
reviews.text: Muy bueno!! Sencillo pero muy limpio y cómodo, los anfitriones super amables y respetuosos, nos recibieron cuando llegamos tarde y sin saber a dónde ir💚
reviews.textTranslated: Very good!! Simple but very clean and comfortable, the hosts were super friendly and respectful, they welcomed us when we arrived late and didn't know where to go.

title: Timo's Guest House
address: Lagja, Rruga Shën Mëhilli, Berat 5001, Albania

reviews.name: Bernardt Namiseb
reviews.text: Great place

reviews.name: Kenan Arat
reviews.text: The hosts were so friendly, you do feel like you are at home! The breakfast is amazing and while you have it, you can enjoy the nice you view from the terrace!

reviews.name: Rum
reviews.text: We went during the off season on Feb 2024. Amazing breakfast. Friendly host. Great views. Clean rooms. Free parking along the main street. 300 year old family owned albanian home. Most importantly, great hosts, who treated us like their kids. We had to climb a few ten metres with heavy luggages. But, believe me, it is absolutely worth it. Clean five stars.

reviews.name: Hermann Belous
reviews.text: Аутентичный гестхаус. Любезная хозяйка. Прекрасная атмосфера
reviews.textTranslated: Authentic guesthouse. Friendly host. Wonderful atmosphere.

reviews.name: ianx17489
reviews.text: What a wonderful guest house, with fantastic terrace view's over the river and Gorica. The hosts gave us such a warm and friendly welcome, incuding some raki and homemade candied fruits. The room was a reasonable size and once again nice views across the river. Really comfortable bed. Breakfast on the terrace was a joy, what a lovely way to start the day. Breakfast was very good and if you love home made jams you are in for a treat.|The castle is a steep fifteen minute climb up from Timo's but very doable.|There are many restaurants on the doorstep and local the bus passes right outside to the main bus terminus. The owner even let us do a load of washing for a small extra charge. |In summary, we are delighted that we chose Timo's for our two night stay in Berat.

reviews.name: Michael Heim
reviews.text: Wunderbar. Sehr zu empfehlen. Schöne Zimmer, freundliche Gastgeber, perfekte Lage.
reviews.textTranslated: Wonderful. Highly recommended. Beautiful rooms, friendly hosts, perfect location.

reviews.name: Gilles Decaix
reviews.text:
Hôtes souriant et accueil parfait
Très bon emplacement pour visiter la vieille ville
reviews.textTranslated:
Friendly hosts and a perfect welcome.
Excellent location for visiting the old town.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value

reviews.name: Mayline Bec
reviews.text:
Wir wurden sehr herzlich begrüßt.
Es gab selbstgemachten Raki und eingelegtes Obst.
Das Zimmer war super sauber und top ausgestattet.
Das Haus ist sehr schön.
Das Frühstück war mehr als ausreichend und der Blick auf Berat - ein Traum.
Wir wären gerne länger geblieben, aber leider waren alle Zimmer schon ausgebucht.
Wir können diese Unterkunft von Herzem empfehlen.
reviews.textTranslated:
We received a very warm welcome.

There was homemade raki and preserved fruit.

The room was spotlessly clean and very well-equipped.

The house is beautiful.

The breakfast was more than ample, and the view of Berat was breathtaking.

We would have loved to stay longer, but unfortunately, all the rooms were already booked.

We wholeheartedly recommend this accommodation.

reviews.name: EC1000
reviews.text: Immersion in Albanian hospitality. Most gracious hosts in a spotless house with a beautiful view. |Room was comfortable with crisp white sheets and towels. |Traditional breakfast served in a beautiful terrace overlooking the river. Table was nicely set. Attention to detail is clearly seen all round. |We highly recommend.

reviews.name: Meli LH
reviews.text: Los dueños son un encanto y te reciben con licores y frutas en almíbar, hecha por ellos y que además se sientan a comerlo contigo. La casa es muy bonita y bien ubicada y la habitación es perfecta. Lo recomiendo 100%
reviews.textTranslated: The owners are charming and welcome you with homemade liqueurs and fruit in syrup, which they even sit down to eat with you. The house is very pretty and well located, and the room is perfect. I highly recommend it.

reviews.name: Elyan Clement
reviews.text: Réservation de dernières minute pour une nuit ! Nous avons était super bien accueilli et la chambre était très propre avec une superbe vue ! Je recommande ++
reviews.textTranslated: Last minute booking for one night! We were very well received and the room was very clean with a superb view! I highly recommend it.

reviews.name: maria marques
reviews.text: Chambre confortable avec un balcon pour profiter de la jolie vue sur le vieux Berat. Petit déjeuner parfait. Propriétaire très gentil.
reviews.textTranslated: Comfortable room with a balcony to enjoy the beautiful view of old Berat. Perfect breakfast. Very kind owner.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review🙏🏼🙏🏼

reviews.name: Manon duprécanron
reviews.text: Excellente adresse, propre, proche du centre et avec parking. Mention spéciale pour la terrasse de la chambre du dernier étage avec une vue incroyable sur Berat illuminé.
reviews.textTranslated: Excellent location, clean, close to the center and with parking. Special mention for the terrace of the top-floor room with an incredible view of Berat illuminated.

reviews.name: sarah milcent
reviews.text: Amazing time here, the breakfast is very delicious and the owners are super Nice and helpful ! I highly recomand, Thank you

reviews.name: Esther Sulman
reviews.text: Super lieve mensen . En heel hygiënisch .en een mooie uitzicht !!
reviews.textTranslated: Super sweet people. And very hygienic, and a beautiful view!!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review ,and you are welcome anytime 🙏🏼🙏🏼wish you all the best🙏🏼

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Quiet, Great value

reviews.name: C. Riemslag
reviews.text:
Fijne,  relaxte plek in Berat, de stad van duizend ramen. Het huis en de tuin zijn tot in de puntjes verzorgd. Zwembadje om even af te koelen is top.
Instructies om het huis te vinden zijn wat onduidelijk. Gewoon in maps intypen en heen rijden. Parkeren in de garage onder het huis
reviews.textTranslated:
A lovely, relaxing spot in Berat, the city of a thousand windows. The house and garden are meticulously maintained. The small pool is perfect for cooling off.
The directions for finding the house are a bit unclear. Just type it into Maps and drive there. Park in the garage underneath the house.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼wish you all yhe best🙏🏼🙏🏼☺️

reviewContext.Walkability: Het appartement ligt wat hoger in het dorp, te voet eenvoudig bereikbaar. 10 min omhoog lopen

reviews.name: PELLICER Vincent
reviews.text:
Une chambre d'hôte excellente ! Un accueil formidable, même si l'accès via le GPS n'est pas des plus facile (il n'indique pas le bon chemin), mais les propriétaires sont disponibles pour vous aider si problème !
La chambre que nous avions (dernier étage) avait une climatisation, très propre et une terrasse avec vue exceptionnelle sur le vieux Berat !
Le plus , une petite piscine, certe en plastique, mais tellement appréciable après une bonne journée de marche sous un soleil de plomb !
Je recommande donc vivement
reviews.textTranslated:
An excellent bed and breakfast! A wonderful welcome, even if getting there via GPS isn't the easiest (it doesn't always give the right directions), but the owners are available to help if you have any problems!
The room we had (top floor) had air conditioning, was very clean, and had a terrace with an exceptional view of old Berat!

The best part was the small swimming pool, admittedly plastic, but so welcome after a long day of walking in the blazing sun!
I highly recommend it.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much ,have a good holiday and wish you all the best🙏🏼Thank you

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Nair Emilia Chamut
reviews.text: Un hermoso lugar para hospedarte. Tienen las camas más cómodas del mundo. La vista es increíble. La familia fue muy amable y muy servicial, el padre de Mario nos hizo el fuego para que usemos en la barbacoa y Bella nos prestó platos, y nos hizo un super queso albanés para untar. Mario también estuvo siempre muy atento. Súper recomendable 💙
reviews.textTranslated: A beautiful place to stay. They have the most comfortable beds in the world. The view is incredible. The family was very kind and helpful; Mario's father lit a fire for us to use on the barbecue, and Bella lent us plates and made us amazing Albanian cheese spread. Mario was also always very attentive. Highly recommended 💙

reviews.name: Alessio Sebastiani
reviews.text: Il posto è una piccola chicca a 5 Min di macchina dal centro di Berat, locale isolato e tranquillo da cui si può godere di un alba sulle montagne, la colazione è stata ottima e la ragazza con cui abbiamo parlato è stata simpaticissima e di un carattere puro , molto ospitale, ci tornerei
reviews.textTranslated: The place is a little gem 5 minutes by car from the center of Berat, isolated and quiet place from which you can enjoy a sunrise over the mountains, the breakfast was excellent and the girl we spoke to was very nice and of a pure character, very hospitable, I would go back

reviews.name: Fabjan Daja
reviews.text: Very clean rooms. Breathtaking view. The people are very friendlly.

reviews.name: Luljeta Totaj
reviews.text: It was a great experince and the view was stunning great value

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value, High-tech

reviews.name: andi hoxha
reviews.text: I had a great stay at Guest House Mario. The host was very welcoming and made me feel comfortable from the moment I arrived. The highlight of the property is definitely the view — absolutely stunning and something I’ll remember. Overall, a relaxing and enjoyable experience, and I’d happily stay here again

reviews.name: 800k views
reviews.text: What a hidden gem! The views from the property are stunning, and the overall atmosphere is so relaxing. You can tell the owners put a lot of care into the decor and upkeep of the place. It was the perfect home base for my trip. If you're looking for a clean, stylish, and welcoming place to stay, look no further

reviews.name: neri rapaj
reviews.text: Clean, comfortable, and well-located. Friendly host and good value. Would stay again.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value, High-tech

reviews.name: Franko Vogli
reviews.text: Stayed here for a few nights and wow… everything was just right, super nice staff and the view was crazy good

reviews.name: Kostika Qafzezi
reviews.text: Came here with my wife for a weekend and had to extend the stay.Beautiful views.Very comfortable and cozy ambient and very helpful and welcoming host.City is also beautiful and very close to the house.Would 100% recommend.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Agnes Roche
reviews.text: Petite chambre, propre, belle vue... par contre pour y accéder en voiture c'est VRAIMENT folklo!!! Mini rue pavée,  très étroite et raide,  supposée à double sens donc on prie pour ne pas se retrouver face à une autre voiture!!! Pas mal d'aboiement de chiens la nuit....
reviews.textTranslated: Small, clean room with a nice view... however, getting there by car is a REAL adventure!!! A tiny, cobbled street, very narrow and steep, supposedly two-way, so you pray you don't end up facing another car!!! Quite a lot of barking dogs at night....

reviewContext.Nearby activities: Centre aux mille fenêtres à 20 mns à pied.

reviews.name: christelle coustier
reviews.text: Petit hôtel familial très bien situé, pour les visites. Nous avons être très bien accueilli. La chambre était confortable. Très belle vue de la terrasse et petit déjeuner délicieux !! emplacement de parking, très pratique.
reviews.textTranslated: A small, family-run hotel in a great location for sightseeing. We received a very warm welcome. The room was comfortable. The terrace had a lovely view and the breakfast was delicious! The parking was very convenient.

reviews.name: Mathieu H.
reviews.text:
Mira was a wonderful host, and helpful for discovering Berat and canyon.
Breakfasts on the terrace are great.
Perfectly located to discover Berat and its castle.

reviews.name: 17reynaldr
reviews.text: A short experience with one night in Berat but it was great, very kind person and the villa was very clean. The private parking is one more thing.|The breakfast with a incredible view !

reviews.name: Hedvig Mathiasson
reviews.text: Så mysigt hotell med jättegod frukost
reviews.textTranslated: Such a cozy hotel with a delicious breakfast

reviews.name: Venona16
reviews.text:
Do Villi trzeba dojść jakieś 40 minut pieszo z postoju busików. Jednakże usytuowana jest w cudownym paśmie domków i restauracji.
Sklepy z pamiątkami i piękne widoki z tarasu sprawiają, że czujesz w tym miejscu szczęście. 😀 Sympatyczna gospodyni wytłumaczyła nam jak najłatwiej dojść do zamku znajdującego się na wzgórzu.
Po drodze spotkaliśmy starszego Pana czekającego na towarzysza do partyjki w szachy. Wszystko ma to taki ponadczasowy klimat jakby czas w tym miejscu nie grał żadnej roli.
Bardzo urocze, i wyjątkowe miejsce do spędzania urlopu. Polecam!
reviews.textTranslated:
The villa is about a 40-minute walk from the bus stop. However, it's nestled in a wonderful strip of cottages and restaurants.
Souvenir shops and beautiful views from the terrace make this place feel like a happy place. 😀 The friendly hostess explained the easiest way to get to the castle perched on the hill.
Along the way, we met an elderly gentleman waiting for a companion for a game of chess. It all has a timeless atmosphere, as if time itself played no role here.
A very charming and unique place to spend your vacation. I highly recommend it!

reviewContext.Rooms: Ogrzewany klimatyzacją, bardzo ciepły, czysty z tv.
reviewContext.Walkability: Wszędzie łatwo się dostać pieszo, choć trzeba uważać na dziury w chodnikach.
reviewContext.Food & drinks: Na śniadanie omlet jajeczny z sokiem smacznym i pieczywo z marmoladą z pomarańczy i jabłek. Wszystko to ma swój klimacik bo dosłownie obok tarasu rośnie drzewko pomarańczowe :) wyobraźnia więc działa.

reviews.name: Katarzyna M
reviews.text: Beautiful view, very good breakfast, very nice and clean room, the owner is very friendly and accomodating. I highly recommend

reviews.name: Koreaner & Deutsche
reviews.text:
청결하고 주인분 친절하고 좋습니다.
조식은 기대를 해서 그런지 살짝 실망했는데 다시 생각해보니 공짜조식으로는 100% 만족합니다.
뚜벅이들한테는 조금 멀고 차있으면 노상관.
오히려 주차하기 편하고 한적해서 더 좋습니다.

추천쓰
reviews.textTranslated:
It is clean, the owner is friendly, and it is great.

I was slightly disappointed with the breakfast, perhaps because I had high expectations, but thinking about it again, I am 100% satisfied with it as a free breakfast.

It is a bit far for those without cars, but it doesn't matter if you have a car.

In fact, it is better because parking is convenient and it is quiet.

Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Hasan Agovic
reviews.text: Çok güzel , nezih ve sıcak bir ortam, sahipleri çok ilgili . Kahve sunumu çok tatlı. Kesinlikle tavsiye ediyorum....
reviews.textTranslated: It's a very nice, elegant and warm atmosphere, the owners are very attentive. The coffee presentation is lovely. I definitely recommend it....

reviews.name: Lik Tsche
reviews.text: Sehr nettes Guesthouse. Garten, in dem das Frühstück serviert wird. Schöne Atmosphäre.
reviews.textTranslated: Very nice guesthouse. Garden where breakfast is served. Lovely atmosphere.

reviews.name: Fereshte Hakimi
reviews.text: Freundliche Gastgrberin, köstlicher Frühstuck
reviews.textTranslated: Friendly hostess, delicious breakfast

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Hadi gülümse Gül GNRYC
reviews.text: Harika bir ortam, bahce cok güzel harika çiçek ve portakal limon cicekleri kokusu ile. Odalar tertemiz ve hersey mevcut. Ev sahipleri bizim gibi cok sicak kanlı ve misafirperver. Kesinlikle tavsiye ederim
reviews.textTranslated: A wonderful setting, the garden is beautiful with lovely flowers and the scent of orange and lemon blossoms. The rooms are spotlessly clean and everything is provided. The hosts are very warm and hospitable, just like us. I definitely recommend it.

reviews.name: Kardelen Çölkuşu
reviews.text:
Perfect stay!
The house is clean, cozy, and the location is delightful.
Icing on the cake Luli, the owner, is a fantastic and incredibly kind person.
If you’re looking for a place to stay in Berat, this is your home :)

reviews.name: Albi Spaho
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Pershendetje!
Ju lutem mund te na tregoni per shume per eksperiencen tuaj ne guest house-in tone, ne menyrë që të përmirësohemi në të ardhmen. Çfarë date na keni vizituar dhe çfarë nuk shkoi mirë? Ju mirëpresim sërish në të ardhmen!

reviews.name: la
reviews.text: Great guest house in central location. Up a narrow cobblestone path from the main street this family owned place offers great views over the city. The rooms are spotless, the beds made to perfection and all the furniture looks new. The bathroom might be the cleanest I have ever seen in a hostel, two towels were provided. The balcony/terrace overlooks the valley towards the south. Finally the family members I met, Pavlo and Fabiola, were extremely hospitable, very attentive and made sure I had a great experience. I stayed here in off season and had the full place to myself, believe it not to be a party hostel but lovely guest house type of accommodation for max comfort. Overall great value for price!

reviews.name: Aviyah Baht Sinai
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful stay at Ziu House. It was very quiet and peaceful, the perfect place to rest after exploring Berat. The atmosphere feels calm and safe, and it’s a great choice if you want to relax without noise around you.

Finding it can be a little tricky at first, but once you know the way, it’s worth it — I even made a video to help future guests locate it more easily.

If you’re looking for a simple, quiet guesthouse where you can actually rest, Ziu House is a solid choice. I’d definitely recommend it.

reviews.name: Patty C
reviews.text:
The room was very clean and the bedding was comfortable.
Towels were provided.
Power outlets next to the bed as well as a storage locker for personal items.

Inside the room, there was also a kettle, cups, a powerful hairdryer, and a small fridge.

The bathroom was very spacious and came with shower gel and shampoo.

The only thing that could be improved is the cleaning schedule. It would be better if room cleaning started at a fixed time, for example after 10 a.m.

If someone checks out early, the lady comes in right away to change the sheets.

At the time, there were only three of us staying in the dorm.
The next morning, the other two left early, and the landlady came in to change the bedding around 7 a.m.
I would stay for two more nights though, not checking out on the same day.

But I still give five stars for the room and nice landlady there.

reviewContext.Walkability: 50 mins from bus terminal but 5-10mins walk to scenic spots

reviews.name: Fermín Luna
reviews.text: Good hostel, perfectly located and with a nice view of the town and the mountains. The rooms are well equipped and the bathrooms are big and comfortable. The terrace is a highlight and the price makes it a great deal. Would definitely go back!

reviews.name: So G
reviews.text:
Amazing host!! The loveliest, most helpful guy ever! His parents also were super lovely. All were very helpful and answered any questions. Even on WhatsApp. Went out their way to help and support and make our stay easy and enjoyable. Went above and beyond.
Free water filtered in rooms.
Kettle, mugs, fridge, hairdryer in room.
Huge rooms, so clean. Very comfy beds - the best pillows!
Location was excellent.
Very safe. Fast Wi-Fi. Washing line. Super clean. Big bathrooms.

reviews.name: Silke De Wilde
reviews.text: Een hostel op een prachtig gelegen locatie, in een smal gezellig straatje. Een supergezellig terrasje met uitzicht op de bergen en berat. Ik werd alleen maar enthousiaster hoe meer ik van dit hostel zag. Propere grote badkamer, met grote spiegels, wat altijd leuk is voor een meisje te zijn 😅. Ook de mensen hier zijn enorm enorm vriendelijk, een zoon en zijn ouders denk ik. Die met een vriendelijke lach mij hebben geholpen. Savonds had ik nog homemade tequilla gekregen en smorgends kreeg ik de rustigste, oprechtste manier goeiemorgend van de vrouw hier. Kort samengevat, echt een aanrader, ik wou dat ik hier langer kon blijven.
reviews.textTranslated: A hostel in a beautiful location, on a narrow, cozy street. A super cozy terrace with a view of the mountains and Berat. I only got more enthusiastic the more I saw of this hostel. Clean, large bathroom with big mirrors, which is always fun for a girl 😅. The people here are also incredibly friendly, a son and his parents I think, who helped me with a friendly smile. In the evening I was served homemade tequila, and in the morning I received the calmest, most sincere good morning from the woman here. In short, highly recommended; I wish I could stay here longer.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value

reviews.name: Mylène Déforel
reviews.text: Magnifique endroit, la terrasse est très jolie, le petit-déjeuner copieux et les lits sont très confortables ! Merci pour l'accueil chaleureux !
reviews.textTranslated: A magnificent place, the terrace is lovely, the breakfast is plentiful, and the beds are very comfortable! Thank you for the warm welcome!

reviews.name: Michelle W.
reviews.text: Tolle Unterkunft, wunderschöne Veranda mit Ausblick. Perfekte Lage um zu Fuß in die Altstadt zu gehen. Ganz liebe Gastgeber, die jederzeit erreichbar sind und gute Tipps für die Umgebung geben. Danke für den schönen Aufenthalt!
reviews.textTranslated: Great accommodation, beautiful veranda with a view. Perfect location for walking to the old town. Very lovely hosts who are always available and give great tips about the area. Thank you for the wonderful stay!

reviews.name: Martin Hoxha
reviews.text: Super 👌

reviews.name: cheshta Sharma
reviews.text:
My stay at Timber Guest House turned my vacation in Berat into a wonderful experience. The newly furnished accommodation, nestled in the attractive old neighbourhood, is not only well-equipped but also exquisitely decorated, creating a cosy and inviting atmosphere. My experience was enhanced by the host’s exceptional compassion and support.
The host greeted me with a delicious buffet of fruits, biscuits, and beverages. The kind gesture emphasised Timber Guest House’s real hospitality. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for the warm greeting and the owner’s unequalled generosity. My time here has become a treasured memory in my heart, making Timber Guest House an excellent choice for anyone visiting Berat. Timber Guest House is a real gem in Berat.
If u decide to visit Berat definitely stay at Timber Guest House

reviews.name: Srabonto Shawon
reviews.text: I spent couple of days there in October and was delighted by the view and experience. The Host was more than welcoming to us, treated us as her own guests, like we are a distance relative and we visited her for a vacation. The location is in the 4-5 minutes walk from the centre yet there is privacy and calmness, you don’t feel disturbed by any laud noises of the city. A few minutes of walk would get you to all the best Cafes and restaurants. Plus the Castle is just 15-20 minutes of climb away as you walked out of the House. You have a beautiful ancient mosque near the guest house, please do check it out. . I always liked the morning view from the Balcony to the mountains, which gives you an overview of the beautiful landscape of Berat. In summary, the stay in the guest house was a wholesome experience while the city gives you an exotic vacation experience.

reviews.name: Ανιτα Τοσκα
reviews.text:
We had such a great time everything was clean perfect lovely hospitality and a peaceful place ❤️
Thank you a lot we definitely will come and visit again

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly

reviews.name: Armela Reka
reviews.text:
My stay at this guest house in Berat, Albania was an absolute delight. The picturesque setting overlooking the city is breathtaking. The staff's warm hospitality added an extra layer of comfort to my visit. The room was impeccably clean and cozy. Without a doubt, this guest house is a hidden gem in Berat, and I can't wait to return.
Timber Guest House, the best! 😍🤍

reviews.name: Fritzi
reviews.text:
Ein herrliches, ruhiges und sehr schön eingerichtetes Appartment!
Es bietet alles, um perfekt schlafen zu können und tagsüber eine herrliche Siesta auf der angenehmen Terrasse zu halten.

Statt Autos gibt es Hühner, Hähne und sehr schöne Katzen zu sehen.

Ich hab meinen Aufenthalt verlängert, da das Timber Guest House perfekt für einen richtigen Urlaub während des Reisens ist.
reviews.textTranslated:
A wonderful, quiet, and beautifully furnished apartment!

It offers everything you need for a perfect night's sleep and a relaxing siesta on the pleasant terrace during the day.

Instead of cars, you'll find chickens, roosters, and very cute cats.

I extended my stay because Timber Guest House is perfect for a real vacation while traveling.

reviewContext.Rooms: Groß, hell, sehr schön eingerichtet, sehr sauber, smarttv und sogar eine voll ausgestattete Küche. Ein Traum!
reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value, High-tech
