address: PX42+55J, Rruga Llambi Guxhumani, Berat, Albania

reviews.name: Sandy Schröter
reviews.text: Vielen Dank, selbst das Frühstück war perfekt. Sehr gerne wieder 👌
reviews.textTranslated: Thank you so much, even the breakfast was perfect. I'd love to come back again 👌

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Claudia kleines Reich
reviews.text: Auf jeden Fall empfehlenswerte Unterkunft mitten in der Altstadt und super Frühstück
reviews.textTranslated: Definitely recommendable accommodation in the heart of the old town and great breakfast

reviews.name: Kaja Yun Ringstad
reviews.text: Bodde 2 netter her. Nydelig, stort, rent rom.
reviews.textTranslated: Stayed here for 2 nights. Lovely, large, clean room.

reviewContext.Rooms: Flott og stort rom. Var veldig rent. Kjøleskap var et stort pluss.

reviews.name: Katrin Kummer
reviews.text:
Ein sehr liebevoll eingerichtetes Zimmer mit großem Bett.Es war alles tipptopp sauber und gepflegt. Wir wurden sehr herzlich empfangen. Das hausgemachte regionale Frühstück war fantastisch.
Die Lage ist zentral. Zur Promenade sind es nur wenige Gehminuten.

Vielen Dank für den schönen Aufenthalt in Berat, liebe Vasilika. Wir kommen gern wieder.

Katrin und Franziska aus Berlin
reviews.textTranslated:
A beautifully furnished room with a large bed. Everything was spotlessly clean and well-maintained. We received a very warm welcome. The homemade regional breakfast was fantastic.

The location is central. The promenade is just a short walk away.

Thank you so much for the wonderful stay in Berat, dear Vasilika. We would love to come back.

Katrin and Franziska from Berlin

reviews.name: vincent ayala
reviews.text: Super rapport qualité prix et petit déjeuner gargantuesque. Les deux dames sont très gentilles et accueillantes.
reviews.textTranslated: Excellent value for money and a gargantuan breakfast. The two ladies are very kind and welcoming.

reviews.name: susy230563
reviews.text: La guesthouse si trova nella parte vecchia di Berat che dovete raggiungere a piedi lasciando l'auto nei parcheggi esterni al nucleo storico. Abbiamo prenotato a febbraio, per tempo, visto che è uno di quei posti dove bisogna avere fortuna per dormirci.La struttura è gestita da una simpatica signora che lavorando all'estero è riuscita a ristrutturare la vecchia casa natia, mantenendone il fascino e senza snaturare le tradizioni.E' difficile rimanerne delusione vista la cura nei particolari, nella bianchieria, negli arredamenti che abbiamo trovato.Le camere affacciano sul cortile comune e le finestre della camera in cui abbiamo dormito, sul centro storico e sul fiume Osum. La colazione inclusa era luculliana e abbontantissima
reviews.textTranslated: The guesthouse is located in the old part of Berat, which you can reach on foot, leaving your car in the parking lot outside the historic center. We booked in February, well in advance, as it's one of those places where you have to be lucky to get a night's sleep. The property is run by a charming woman who, working abroad, has managed to renovate her old family home, preserving its charm without compromising its traditions. It's hard to be disappointed, given the attention to detail, the linens, and the furnishings we found. The rooms overlook the shared courtyard, and the windows of the room we stayed in overlook the old town and the Osum River. The included breakfast was sumptuous and plentiful.

reviews.name: HelloYouAreBugged
reviews.text:
Das Zimmer und die Location waren wirklich wunderschön, und die Aussicht vom Dach macht dem Namen alle Ehre. Unsere Gastgeberin war herzlich, hilfsbereit und hat uns mit vielen interessanten Geschichten über Berat begeistert, was den Aufenthalt wirklich besonders gemacht hat.
Ein paar Dinge, die zukünftigen Gästen helfen könnten: Das Frühstück wurde etwas später als angegeben serviert, was bei einem engen Zeitplan herausfordernd sein kann. Außerdem lohnt es sich, bei der Buchung genau auf die Fotos zu achten, da diese zeigen, welches Badezimmer dem jeweiligen Zimmer zugeordnet ist und es ist zu beachten, dass die Badezimmer sich nicht direkt beim Zimmer befinden. Zudem gab es widersprüchliche Aussagen bezogen auf die Badezimmer, laut Gastgeberin und den Hausregeln werden die Bäder geteilt, jedoch sagte uns der Gastgeber, dass die diejenigen Badezimmer abgeschlossen werden, die nicht zur Buchung gehören.Etwas mehr Transparenz hierzu im Allgemeinen wäre hilfreich gewesen.
Insgesamt ein schöner Ort mit viel Charme, und mit etwas mehr Kommunikation im Allgemeinen wäre es ein rundum perfektes Erlebnis gewesen
reviews.textTranslated:
The room and the location were truly beautiful, and the view from the rooftop lived up to its name. Our hostess was warm, helpful, and shared many interesting stories about Berat, which made our stay truly special.

A few things that might help future guests: Breakfast was served a little later than advertised, which can be challenging if you're on a tight schedule. Also, it's worth paying close attention to the photos when booking, as they show which bathroom is assigned to each room, and it's important to note that the bathrooms are not directly adjacent to the rooms. Furthermore, there was conflicting information regarding the bathrooms. According to the hostess and the house rules, the bathrooms are shared, but the host told us that the bathrooms not included in the booking are locked. A little more transparency regarding this would have been helpful.

Overall, a lovely place with lots of charm, and with a bit more communication, it could have been a truly perfect experience.

reviews.name: Stephan B
reviews.text:
Wer eine authentische Unterkunft in Berat sucht, wird hier eine tolle Zeit haben.
Wir haben uns ein Bad mit anderen Gästen geteilt, obwohl wir ein Zimmer mit eigenem Bad gebucht haben. Auf Nachfrage hat uns der Gastgeber ein entsprechendes Zimmer angeboten, wir lehnten dann aber ab, da uns das Zimmer mit Stadtblick dann doch besser gefallen hat.😊
Das Bad war stets sauber, wenn auch 2:1 (Dusche & WC)
Die Zimmer waren zeitgenössisch gestaltet, wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.
Der Gastgeber war immer freundlich, hilfsbereit und hatte Antworten auf touristische Fragen zur Kultur und Traditionen.

Wer nicht minimalistisch ist, sollte ins Hotel gehen. Wer aber ein authentisches Gasthaus mit tollen Eindrücken sucht, wird hier sehr glücklich 😊

Es wurde ein Frühstück serviert, auf Nachfrage gab es auch immer Nachschub. Fußläufig war alles in zentraler Nähe.
reviews.textTranslated:
Anyone looking for authentic accommodation in Berat will have a great time here.

We shared a bathroom with other guests, even though we had booked a room with a private bathroom. Upon request, the host offered us a room with a private bathroom, but we declined because we preferred the room with a city view. 😊 The bathroom was always clean, even though it was a 2:1 ratio (shower & toilet).

The rooms were decorated in a contemporary style, and we felt very comfortable.

The host was always friendly and helpful and had answers to our tourist questions about the culture and traditions.

If you're not into minimalist accommodations, you should stay in a hotel. But if you're looking for an authentic guesthouse with a wonderful atmosphere, you'll be very happy here. 😊

Breakfast was served, and refills were always available upon request. Everything was within walking distance in the city center.

reviews.name: Alexandra S.
reviews.text: Wir hatten einen angenehmen Aufenthalt und haben die Aussicht und die Lage im historischen Zentrum Berats genossen. Wichtig zu erwähnen ist, dass es weit oben liegt. Also besser keinen großen Koffer mitbringen, sonder mit leichtem Gepäck anreisen. Notfalls kann aber in Absprache und gegen Bezahlung jemand kommen und beim Tragen helfe. Der Gastgeber Erald war stets erreichbar und hat uns sogar zum Bus Terminal gefahren. Beim Frühstück darf man kein Hotel-Niveau erwarten, aber es gibt Gemüse, Eier, Butter und selbstgemachte Marmelade mit Kaffee oder Tee. Es hat auf jeden Fall altertümlichen Charme, weil es ein historisches Gebäude ist - also keine moderne Unterkunft erwarten :) uns hat es gefallen :)
reviews.textTranslated: We had a pleasant stay and enjoyed the view and the location in the historic center of Berat. It's important to note that it's located high up, so it's best not to bring a large suitcase, but to travel light. However, if necessary, someone can come and help with carrying things, by arrangement and for a fee. The host, Erald, was always available and even drove us to the bus terminal. Don't expect hotel-quality breakfast, but there are vegetables, eggs, butter, and homemade jam with coffee or tea. It definitely has an old-world charm because it's a historic building—so don't expect modern accommodations :) We liked it :)

reviews.name: Sara Bąk
reviews.text: 250 letni dom wielopokoleniowy zlokalizowany u wzgórz Beratu, oferuje piękne widoki na zabytkowe miasto. Gospodarz przygotował dla nas śniadanie- proste ale z bardzo dobrej jakości lokalnych produktów. Polecam, świetne doświadczenie
reviews.textTranslated: This 250-year-old multigenerational house nestled in the hills of Berat offers beautiful views of the historic city. The host prepared a simple breakfast for us, using high-quality local produce. I highly recommend it; it was a wonderful experience.

reviews.name: Tim Rosseburg
reviews.text:
Wir haben hier eine Nacht verbracht und unsere Erfahrung war leider enttäuschend. Obwohl die Unterkunft auf Booking.com sehr gut bewertet ist, können wir das nicht nachvollziehen.

Das Zimmer, das wir bekamen, war nicht das ursprünglich gebuchte, sondern wurde uns „außerhalb der Plattform“ angeboten. Dadurch war es uns nicht möglich, über Booking.com eine Bewertung abzugeben.

Bei Regen tropfte es durch die Decke.

Es gab zunächst kein Frühstück – erst nach Nachfrage wurde etwas serviert. Dieses war allerdings sehr dürftig und minimalistisch.

Die Bezahlung musste bar erfolgen. Das Rückgeld erhielten wir nicht in der Landeswährung (Lek), sondern in Euro. Auf Nachfrage reagierte der Gastgeber unfreundlich.

WLAN hat nur zeitweise funktioniert.

Im Zimmer roch es stark nach Mäuse-Urin.

Das Badezimmer liegt außerhalb des Zimmers und wird von mehreren Gästen genutzt (das war zwar beschrieben, sollte aber erwähnt werden).

Das Mobiliar ist sehr alt; u. a. ein alter Sessel mit einem verschlissenen Stofftier.

Die Decken sind sehr niedrig – man stößt sich schnell den Kopf.

Der Gastgeber war nicht so freundlich und hilfsbereit, wie auf Booking beschrieben. Er wirkte eher zurückhaltend und nicht wirklich unterstützend.

Alles in allem würden wir die Unterkunft nicht weiterempfehlen.
reviews.textTranslated:
We spent one night here and our experience was unfortunately disappointing. Although the accommodation has very good ratings on Booking.com, we can't understand why.

The room we received wasn't the one we originally booked, but was offered to us "off-platform." This prevented us from leaving a review through Booking.com.

When it rained, water leaked through the ceiling.

There was no breakfast initially – only after we asked was something served. What breakfast it was, however, was very meager and minimal.

Payment had to be made in cash. We received our change not in the local currency (Lek), but in Euros. When we asked about this, the host was unfriendly.

The Wi-Fi only worked intermittently.

The room smelled strongly of mouse urine.

The bathroom is located outside the room and is shared by several guests (this was mentioned in the description, but it should be noted).

The furniture is very old; including an old armchair with a worn-out stuffed animal.

The ceilings are very low – you'll easily bump your head.

The host wasn't as friendly and helpful as described on Booking.com. He seemed rather reserved and not very supportive.

All in all, we wouldn't recommend this accommodation.

reviews.name: GBH _
reviews.text:
Charming antique guesthouse in a fantastic central location in Berat. The owner is extremely kind and helpful, which made our stay even more enjoyable. Just be aware that reaching the guesthouse involves a steep climb.

A few small downsides: the toilet in our specific room was very tiny and there was no bidet. Also, there was no trash can in the room, which would have been a useful addition. These small touches would have made the experience even better.

reviews.name: Harry Payne
reviews.text: Very pleasant stay. Host was great, view from the room was amazing and really nice location near lots of authentic bars and restaurants

reviews.name: İlkay Temur
reviews.text: Bookingden bakıp geldik ancak iki gece kalacağımız için ve fiyat yükseltmek için oda vermediler
reviews.textTranslated: We came here after checking through Booking.com, but they wouldn't give us a room because we were only staying for two nights and they wanted to raise the price.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: We have warned you in advance, but you are incomprehensible and deceitful people.

reviews.name: Rhea Beilharz
reviews.text: Steep walk up with heavy bags but incredibly well worth it. Felt peaceful and serene, especially when hearing the call to prayer and watching the hills below. Friendly and great communication from owners, thanks for having us!

reviews.name: Rebwar Sulayman
reviews.text: Need to have good trainers on as you will have to park far away from the flat them climb up on cobbled narrow path, the place itself is charming however little sitting area

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value

reviews.name: Ed Lee
reviews.text: Berat Old Town is the prettiest town that I have come across in my last 25 years of travel and my room in Hava Baci is everything that I could wish for for its amazing views  perched high over the highest side of the West Bank of the Old Town.  For this privilege,I had to work hard half carrying n half dragging my 12kg roller bag over cobblestones while navigating my way through a maze  of stone walled paths that all are steeper than the one before.  So, be warned and be realistic of ur own abilities. But do not despair, there's one mule on duty at the bottom. Im sure the guesthouse can arrange for your transfer. I promise u won't be disappointed n if u are, maybe you are better off staying with a group tour.

reviews.name: SaritaJosefina82
reviews.text: Basic geest house maar alles wat je nodig hebt.|Prachtig zicht en vriendelijke gastvrouw maken het af.boven het hotel heb je Bar veranda van dezelfde gastvrouw en hier is het zicht nog mooier.|Echt aanrader. Prijs kwaliteit is een goede verhouding
reviews.textTranslated: Basic guesthouse but everything you need. Beautiful view and friendly hostess top it off. Above the hotel, there is a bar veranda run by the same hostess, and the view here is even better. Highly recommended. Good value for money.

reviews.name: Jane Levine
reviews.text: Lovely hotel & owner, great views & location. Excellent breakfast. Just bring appropriate footwear for Berat cobblestone streets.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value

reviews.name: Erlind Bega
reviews.text:
I sleep very well and the rooms are very prettyy.
The owner was so friendly with us and the breakfast was so generous and so delicious.
Thank you so much Joseph and Rovena we definitely come back!!!❤️❤️

reviews.name: Alberto Joral Gomez
reviews.text: Hoy día 5 de Mayo paseando por Berat nos encontramos con una bodega para comprar y catar vinos de la Región , nos ha atendido en su establecimiento nuestro ya amigo Josif Prifti, hemos probado sus caldos y hemos hablado de los de mi tierra Rivera del Duero, un completo placer hablar y degustar conociendo su elaboración y vinicultura . Josif muchas gracias por la cata y nos vemos en Valladolid
reviews.textTranslated: Today, May 5th, while strolling through Berat, we stumbled upon a winery where we could buy and taste wines from the region. Our friend Josif Prifti served us at his establishment. We sampled his wines and discussed those from my home region, Ribera del Duero. It was a complete pleasure to talk and taste, learning about their production and winemaking. Josif, thank you so much for the tasting, and we'll see you in Valladolid!

reviews.name: U8898SWandym
reviews.text: Went for the 2025 Berat wine Festival so last-minute booking, excellent 5 ? room guest house with lovely rooms, great view, a fantastic location and very helpful owners / staff. Quiet place but still only 5 - 10 minutes' walk to the town centre. Stayed in Room 4, beautifully furnished, great view, plenty of room and a very comfortable bed. All very clean and well kept. lovely little terrace for breakfast outside with a view if you choose.

reviews.name: Andy Miller
reviews.text: Perfect location, excellent room; clean and tastefully furnished, very comfortable bed good bathroom. Lovely view south of the river and towards Timori if you stick your neck out the window ! Great breakfast outside on the small terrace,  and super helpful and friendly owners

reviews.name: Greis Konini
reviews.text:
Traditional establishment with a river view in the heart of Berat’s old city, an unforgettable experience. The building itself is full of character, beautifully preserved with original stonework, wooden beams, and stunning views of the historic Gorica and Mangalem quarters. Location is perfect for exploring Berat on foot, with all the key attractions just a short walk away.
The rooms were clean, cozy, and tastefully decorated to reflect the heritage of the area, while still offering all the modern comforts like air conditioning and reliable Wi-Fi.
The breakfast was plentiful and absolutely tasty.
The owner went above and beyond to accommodate all of our needs.
Absolutely recommend!!

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Gonçalo Ramalho
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about this place. We had an amazing experience.

Location couldn't be better, typical Berat house but not too far from the main road, so you don't need to "climb" with your bags. Perfect to walk around Berat and Goriza. The room was amazing, looked carved in stone, and the bed was very comfortable.

The breakfast was incredible, it was so much we couldn't eat all of it.

But the best was the people, everyone made us feel very welcome. The owner answered all my questions before we arrived. And while we were there they helped us get to our new destination even after we checked out. We lost our bus and they made calls to find out how we could get to our destiny for our budget.

True Albanian kindness that we will never forget.

reviews.name: Trejsi Elezi
reviews.text: I had a great stay at Guest House Prifti in the heart of Mangalem. The service was warm and welcoming – the hosts were always ready to help with anything we needed. The rooms were clean, cozy, and had a traditional charm that made the experience even more special. Everything was well maintained, and the location is perfect if you want to explore the old town. Highly recommended for a peaceful and authentic stay in Berat!

reviews.name: Mikael Mangold
reviews.text: Wondeful! Very cosy, personal and friendly. Would highly recommend :)

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: arie bendayan
reviews.text:
A charming and authentic stay in the heart of Berat!!!
This beautiful traditional house is perfectly located in the center of Berat, allowing you to truly feel the city’s unique atmosphere. The rooms are tastefully decorated, comfortable, and equipped with air conditioning and a fridge. The host is exceptionally kind and goes out of their way to ensure a pleasant and memorable stay. A freshly prepared breakfast is included and adds a lovely touch to the experience. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a cozy and authentic stay in Berat!
Just keep in mind there are some steep stairs to reach the guest house from the street (as everywhere in Berat)

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value

reviews.name: Elestja Aliaj
reviews.text: Very kind hosts , friendly and nice . Very cozy rooms and very comfortable . Everthing was clean and the location was really nice , near the castle

reviews.name: Moritz Seeber
reviews.text: Marjo and his family were the kindest and most helpful hosts my girlfriend and I have ever met. From the very beginning, they made us feel truly welcome and at home. The accommodation was wonderful as well — clean, comfortable, and perfectly located. We really enjoyed our stay in Albania and will definitely come back here on our next trip. Thank you again for the amazing hospitality!

reviews.name: Robert Niedziela
reviews.text:
Świetna lokalizacja. Cudowni właściciele. Pyszne śniadanie
Polecam
reviews.textTranslated: Great location. Wonderful owners. Delicious breakfast. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: JUAN JAVIER DEL RIO SALANOVA
reviews.text: Ubicación muy chula, gente realmente amable y pendientes de todo desayuno muy agradable, estuvimos 2 noches lo único aparcar puede ser un poco enfarragoso. Por lo demás increíble
reviews.textTranslated: Great location, really friendly people who were very attentive to everything, and a lovely breakfast. We stayed two nights; the only downside was that parking can be a bit of a hassle. Otherwise, it was amazing.

reviews.name: Koo Ys
reviews.text: Wonderful choice, tasty breakfast well-prepared by the host.  Marjo and his parent is nice!!  Place is clean and just beneath the castle, perfect location and it’s still at an affordable price!!  Would highly recommend it

reviews.name: Oriol Gasset
reviews.text:
Nuestra estancia en House Marjo fue realmente especial. Desde el primer momento nos sentimos como en casa gracias a la amabilidad y cercanía de los dueños, un matrimonio encantador que nos trató con un cariño enorme. La casa es preciosa, muy limpia y cuidada hasta el más mínimo detalle, con todo lo necesario para descansar y disfrutar de la ciudad.

Las vistas al castillo son espectaculares y la ubicación es perfecta, a pocos pasos de todo lo que uno quiere ver en Berat. El desayuno estaba riquísimo, preparado con dedicación y servido con una sonrisa.

Pero lo que más nos gustó, sin duda, fue el trato humano: esa calidez, esas atenciones y esa sensación de que realmente se preocupan porque tu estancia sea agradable. Fue un lugar donde no solo dormimos, sino donde nos llevamos un recuerdo muy bonito de las personas que lo hacen posible
reviews.textTranslated:
Our stay at House Marjo was truly special. From the first moment we felt at home thanks to the kindness and warmth of the owners, a charming couple who treated us with tremendous affection. The house is beautiful, very clean and well-maintained down to the smallest detail, with everything you need to relax and enjoy the city.

The views of the castle are spectacular, and the location is perfect, just steps from everything you want to see in Berat. The breakfast was delicious, prepared with care, and served with a smile.

But what we liked most, without a doubt, was the personal service: that warmth, that attentiveness, and that feeling that they truly care about making your stay a pleasant one. It was a place where we not only slept, but where we took away wonderful memories of the people who made it possible.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value
Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Isabelle xoxo
reviews.text: Wundervolle Gastgeber in einer perfekten Lage, waren eine Nacht dort um und die Burg sowie die Altstadt anzusehen. Zimmer hat leider etwas nach Kanal gerochen, war aber erträglich. Frühstück wunderbar und sehr persönlich auf der Terasse.
reviews.textTranslated: Wonderful hosts in a perfect location; we stayed one night to see the castle and the old town. The room unfortunately smelled a bit like a sewer, but it was tolerable. Breakfast was wonderful and very personal, served on the terrace.

reviews.name: Jonas Call
reviews.text: Tolle Unterkunft direkt an der Burg von Berat. Parkplatz auf dem Grundstück vorhanden, ich empfehle rückwärts einzufahren :). Badezimmer neu und das Frühstück morgens war das Beste was wir in ganz Albanien hatten. Definitiv Empfehlung
reviews.textTranslated: Great accommodation right next to Berat Castle. Parking is available on the property; I recommend reversing in :). The bathroom is new, and the breakfast was the best we had in all of Albania. Definitely recommended.

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Quiet, Great value, High-tech
